form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at this track February 11 over 1100m, 8 len behind Thelonius with 57kg at $8.15. When resuming last campaign 11th of 17 at this track December 28 over 1000m, 11 len behind Principe Gringo with 57kg at $6.15. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 51-day let-up. First-up after two months 12th of 14 at Palermo on February 23 over 1200m, 14 len behind Romulo First with 57.5kg at $135. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at this track on June 27 over 1400m, 20 len behind Taikky with 55kg at $26.45. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 2nd of 7 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Black Boss carrying 56kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at this track on August 29 over 1000m, 6 len behind Furios Halo with 55kg at $5.15. Strong winning chance.
